'''Bob McLeod''' (born [[1950s|1951]]) is a comic book illustrator who worked on a number of issues in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series. McLeod first started working in comics at [[Wikipedia:Continuity Comics|Continuity Comics]] in the early 1970s. From the late 1970s he starting illustrating for [[Marvel Comics]] on various titles, including co-creating the [[Wikipedia:X-Men|''X-Men'']] spin-off series called [[Wikipedia:New Mutants|''New Mutants'']] in [[1982]]. McLeod drew a few issues in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' series in the early 1980s.
